scenarios.name: normal
scenarios.observable: final provider request, response text, state and usage

scenarios.name: tool
scenarios.observable: tool refill records and next provider request value/raw bytes

scenarios.name: cancel
scenarios.command: cargo test -p gateway --features os-tests --test session_prompt_router_flow cancel_after_router_enqueue --quiet
scenarios.observable: accepted user message, cancellation marker and no success fallback

scenarios.name: timeout
scenarios.command: cargo test -p runtime --features business-tests --test provider_timeout_flow runtime_provider_timeout_business_flow --quiet
scenarios.observable: bounded duration, timeout state, error classification and empty output

scenarios.name: compact
scenarios.command: cargo test -p runtime --features business-tests --test runtime_context_business_flow context_business_flow --quiet
scenarios.observable: context order, media, tool refill and compaction boundary

scenarios.name: restart
scenarios.observable: queue recovery, interrupted state, history and checkpoint idempotency

scenarios.name: busy_input
scenarios.command: cargo test -p gateway --features business-tests --test session_prompt_busy_flow busy_session_prompt_business_flow --quiet
scenarios.observable: FIFO queued input, preserved parts and stale cancellation clearing
